content.label: LIATE choice of u and dv
content.applies_when: choose u and dv by LIATE: pick u as the factor higher on the Logarithmic-Inverse-Algebraic-Trig-Exponential list so that du simplifies and dv is easy to integrate

content.label: Integration by parts
content.symbolic: integral u dv = u*v - integral v du

content.concept: u = x, dv = cos x dx
content.meaning: u = x (algebraic, so du = dx) and dv = cos x dx (so v = sin x)

content.label: Choose u and dv
content.action: by LIATE pick u = x and dv = cos x dx, giving du = dx and v = sin x
content.purpose: set up parts so the leftover integral is simpler

content.label: Apply the parts formula
content.action: apply integral u dv = uv - integral v du: x sin x - integral sin x dx
content.purpose: reduce the product integral to an elementary one

content.label: Finish
content.action: integrate integral sin x dx = -cos x, so x sin x + cos x + C
